key_findings.cutile_gemm: CuTile achieves 56% of cuBLAS (850 vs 1518 TF/s at 16384²) — lower ratio than RTX PRO 6000 (76%) because cuBLAS is better optimized for sm_100
key_findings.cutile_attention_breakthrough: CuTile FMHA achieves 1007 TF/s at seq=4096, 2.5× FASTER than FlashAttention-2 (401 TF/s) — the biggest finding for the paper
key_findings.triton_beats_fa2: Triton attention (526 TF/s) also beats FA2 (401 TF/s) on B200 — FA2 not yet optimized for Blackwell
key_findings.cublas_peak: cuBLAS peaks at 1672 TF/s (8192²), indicating B200 theoretical peak around 1800+ TF/s for BF16
key_findings.bf16_vs_fp16: BF16 ≈ FP16 on B200 (ratio 0.96-0.97), unlike RTX PRO 6000 where cuBLAS BF16 was 22% faster
key_findings.e2e_prefill_peak: E2E prefill saturates at ~920 TF/s for batch≥8 (SDPA/FA2)
key_findings.cross_architecture: B200 (sm_100) vs RTX PRO 6000 (sm_120): 3.9× GEMM speedup, 5.6× CuTile attention speedup
